description: Plan, direct, or coordinate entertainment and recreational activities and operations of a recreational facility, including cruise ships and parks. All personal service managers not listed separately. Manage or coordinate fitness and wellness programs and services. Manage and train staff of wellness specialists, health educators, or fitness instructors. (Based on 26 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Use mediation techniques to facilitate communication between disputants and guide them toward mutual agreement.
Interview claimants, agents, or witnesses to obtain information about disputed issues.
Conduct studies of appeals procedures to ensure adherence to legal requirements or to facilitate case disposition.
Specialize in the negotiation and resolution of conflicts involving issues such as natural resource allocation or regional development planning.
Authorize payment of valid claims and prepare settlement agreements for disputants to sign.
Issue subpoenas or administer oaths and prepare for formal hearings.
Participate in court proceedings, conduct hearings, and present evidence to support cases.
Research laws, regulations, and legal precedents to prepare for hearings and reach conclusions.
Evaluate information from documents such as legal filings to assess claims liability and prepare case summaries.
Negotiate settlements of civil disputes and contractual agreements.
Gather evidence from clients and witnesses to formulate defense or initiate legal actions.
Prepare, draft, and review legal documents, including wills, deeds, and contracts.
Confer with colleagues and judges regarding legal questions and case management requirements.
Supervise legal assistants, maintain legal documents, and perform administrative functions related to the practice of law.
Investigate facts and laws of cases, gather information on suspects, and document activities to obtain evidence.
Analyze probable outcomes of cases, using knowledge of legal precedents to inform strategies.
Provide assistance to the public regarding legal issues and navigate legal documents efficiently.
Maintain and update organization information technology applications and network systems blueprints.
Identify and procure needed resources to implement sustainability programs or projects and assess or propose sustainability initiatives.
Develop sustainability project goals, objectives, initiatives, or strategies with other sustainability professionals and communicate effectiveness through reports or presentations.
Monitor contractor work in security system design, construction, and startup phases.
Assess physical security threats, conduct audits for vulnerabilities, and recommend improvements in security systems or procedures.
Design security policies or programs ensuring adequate security for alarm response and access, and create conceptual designs for security systems.
Inspect security systems and physical design features for compliance with applicable standards or regulations.
Interview witnesses or suspects regarding security breaches and monitor tapes or digital recordings for loss identification.
Prepare documentation for case reports, compliance filings, and manage regulatory relationships while maintaining compliance standards.
Conduct internal reviews or audits, and train staff in compliance policies or procedures, monitoring compliance systems effectiveness.
Develop and coordinate fitness and wellness programs or services and supervise specialists such as fitness instructors and health educators.
Conduct training sessions for wellness staff and maintain records related to wellness and fitness programs.
Plan, organize, or lead activities such as group exercise routines or community events and manage wellness program marketing campaigns.
Evaluate fitness and wellness programs for effectiveness and gather attendance or performance data.
Supervise the operation of fitness equipment and demonstrate correct usage to participants.
Discuss programs with customers to convey information and resolve complaints regarding services rendered.
Train workers in company procedures or other relevant topics, and assign tasks and work hours to staff.
Talk to coworkers using electronic devices, such as computers and radios.
Review materials such as marketing literature or user manuals to ensure that regulatory agency requirements are met.
Establish procedures or systems for publishing document submissions in hardcopy or electronic formats, and prepare and submit permit applications for demolition or remediation projects.

Represent organizations before domestic or international regulatory agencies on major policy matters or decisions regarding company products, and provide regulatory guidance to departments regarding design or marketing of products.
Analyze retail data to identify current or emerging trends in theft or fraud and conduct investigations of problems such as employee theft and violations of corporate policies.
Prepare reports or presentations to communicate brownfield redevelopment needs or project progress, and maintain records of decisions and actions related to environmental redevelopment.
Negotiate contracts for services or materials needed for environmental remediation and oversee compliance with environmental laws and standards.
Identify environmental contamination sources and perform feasibility or cost-benefit studies for environmental remediation projects.
Design or implement plans for surface or ground water remediation, and develop plans for the sustainable regeneration of brownfield sites.
Train staff in the use of products, programs, or activities, and coordinate on-site activities for environmental cleanup projects.
Maintain documentation of all loss prevention activity and monitor compliance with operational, safety, or inventory control procedures.
Conduct internal investigations and coordinate theft and fraud investigations involving organized group activities.
Train or coordinate the training of employees in operations, safety, environmental issues, or technical issues, as well as maintain current knowledge of relevant regulations.
Collaborate with law enforcement to investigate and solve external theft or fraud cases, and develop regulatory strategies for new products.
Review or evaluate designs for contaminant treatment or disposal facilities, and assess environmental studies for wind fields.
Manage activities such as audits, inspections, or product recalls to ensure regulatory compliance, and update schedules, estimates, or budgets for wind projects.
